---
id: disable-action
title: "Disable an action without removing it"
description: "🚧 *Coming Soon* — Temporarily suppress an action. It remains attached to the profile but will not fire until re-enabled."
sidebar_label: "Disable an action without removing it"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: api/core/transform-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/actions/{id}/disable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
